# fix(scheduler): /redteam round-1 — retry primitive hardening (#910)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `23565d7baa70` — fix(scheduler): /redteam round-1 — retry primitive hardening (#910)

**Body**:

Cross-agent /redteam round 1 (reviewer + security-reviewer + analyst, 3
parallel agents). Findings consolidated and applied in one fix pass:

- Security MED #2: `_extract_node_failure` ctor-TypeError fallback for
  multi-arg builtins (UnicodeDecodeError requires 5 args). Wrap construction
  in try/except TypeError, fall back to RuntimeError carrying the original
  type name; log at WARN per zero-tolerance.md Rule 3.
- Reviewer MED: replace `__builtins__` lookup with `import builtins` —
  eliminates dual-shape branch (zero-tolerance.md Rule 3d).
- Analyst HIGH F2 + reviewer LOW: deterministic `_extract_node_failure`
  ordering via `sorted(results.keys())` — parallel-branch failures previously
  flipped retry decisions across runs.
- Analyst HIGH F4 (Rule 3c): `_compose_job_kwargs` raises ValueError when
  `retry=` is supplied alongside `dispatch_via=<Dispatcher>`. Silent drop on
  the queue-dispatch path was BLOCKED.
- Analyst MED F6: re-raise `asyncio.CancelledError` BEFORE the broad
  `except Exception` so scheduler shutdown propagates cleanly.
- Analyst MED F7 + observability.md MUST NOT § log-spam-in-hot-loops: per-
  attempt retry log demoted to DEBUG; bubble-up emits ONE summary WARN
  (`exhausted retries: ... attempts=N/M final_exc=...`). Operators get
  one alert per exhausted-retry fire instead of N.
- Reviewer LOW + analyst cross-ref: replace `assert last_exc is not None`
  with explicit `if ... raise RuntimeError(...)` — `python -O` strips
  asserts and would turn the loop-invariant violation into `raise None`.
- Analyst HIGH F1 + MED F5: docstring updates on `RetrySpec` documenting
  cron-fire collision (max_retries × backoff_max_seconds < interval) and
  persistence stability across SDK minor versions.
- Analyst HIGH F3: Tier-2 docstring-exact regression test
  (`test_issue_910_quickstart_executes_end_to_end`) — exercises the brief's
  minimal-repro pipeline against real APScheduler + LocalRuntime.
- Analyst LOW F9: parametrized `test_retry_threading_across_all_schedule_methods`
  across schedule_cron / schedule_interval / schedule_once + dedicated
  linear-backoff e2e + dont_retry_on-overrides-retry_on e2e tests.

Test results: 16 passed (9 new round-1 fix tests + 7 original primitives).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
